violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The scoop used for popcorn seasoning was stored on an unclean surface (top of the container) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
Inspector observed popcorn kernels being stored in non-food grade containers. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The hand-washing sink was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
